relatedness_reasoning: The inbound file contains investment product eligibility data for marketing purposes, while the outbound file is a pre-approved credit offer (personal loan) for the credit department. These represent fundamentally different products (investment vs. credit) with minimal field overlap; the outbound file contains credit-specific fields (credit_score_required, interest_rate, loan terms) and financial terms absent from the inbound schema. While both files reference customers, the business purposes and data structures are incompatible.
